top_signals.title: California pair charged with laundering crypto proceeds from darknet fentanyl sales
top_signals.summary: The pair allegedly shipped over 500 drug parcels over a seven-month period and laundered hundreds of thousands of dollars through crypto.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Dutch police dismantle global crypto investment scam, arrest alleged mastermind
top_signals.summary: Authorities said Wednesday that the group operated like a legitimate international business since at least 2021, running about two dozen call centers across several countries and employing more than 700 people who posed as professional financial advisers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Yen options suggest a slide to 165 level before Japan intervenes
top_signals.summary: Traders are comfortable pricing yen weakness all the way to 165 per dollar — a drop of about 1.6% from the current level, already near the weakest in four decades.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
